creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
The misc/tvm failure looks unrelated and was likely broken by the recent update to devel/dmlc-core [1] which brought in [2]. CC'ing maintainer (yuri@) for this issue and because many of his ports are involved here.

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=266c6f20e597be0b02372e82c5ddc803efcc11a5
[2] https://github.com/dmlc/dmlc-core/commit/3031e4a61a98f49f07a42cfdec6242340fb2fd8c
